name: 6q27_subtelomeric_SD
description: 6q27 subtelomeric SD-rich region containing MLLT4/AFDN (recurrent t(6;11) AML translocation partner with KMT2A) and ERMARD. Subtelomeric SD blocks at ~96% identity shared with other chromosome ends mediate recurrent terminal 6q deletions associated with intellectual disability and corpus-callosum agenesis (6q27 deletion / PACS2-related).

architecture.internal_structure: Subtelomeric SD blocks shared with multiple chromosome ends at ~96% identity; MLLT4 intragenic SDs; degenerate (TTAGGG)n telomere boundary at distal end.
